description: Tests whether retrieval surfaces sparse ERROR/WARNING signal from a high volume of INFO noise. 200+ INFO lines surround 8 critical error lines across 2 services.

questions.question: what errors occurred in the payment pipeline
questions.ground_truth_answer: The payment gateway connection pool was exhausted because the upstream fraud-check-svc started timing out. Fraud-check-svc was overloaded after a batch job flooded it with 10,000 retroactive checks, causing payment authorizations to queue and eventually fail with gateway timeouts.

questions.question: fraud check service problems
questions.ground_truth_answer: Fraud-check-svc became overloaded when a batch job submitted 10,000 retroactive fraud checks at once. The service's worker pool was saturated, causing individual check latency to spike from 50ms to 12 seconds, which cascaded into payment-gw timeouts.
